member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.ExecuteMode
member.summary: Enum to control template execution mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.ExecuteMode.Configure
member.summary: Configure Mode, run once during Init to build the Forwarding Table.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.ExecuteMode.DumpTables
member.summary: Print out all the VminForwarding Table information.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.MyBool
member.summary: Simple enum to hold True/False parameter values.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.MyBool.True
member.summary: Enum for True.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.MyBool.False
member.summary: Enum For false.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.RulesFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the DieRecovery Rules file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.SKUFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the DieRecovery SKU Definition file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.TrackerFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the DieRecovery Tracker configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets the Templates Execution Mode (Only Configure is valid for a production test program).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.AllowDefeatures
member.summary: Gets or sets the value indicating whether DownBins are valid. If false, the Trackers can only be written once and will fail if their value is changed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.SaveHistory
member.summary: Gets or sets the value indicating whether to save the name of every test that updates a DieRecovery Tracker.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DieRecoveryBase.EnablePreTestCheck
member.summary: Gets or sets the value indicating whether VminTC should run the die recovery rules before executing the search. If this is set to True and the pre-test check fails, VminTC exit port will depend only on the results of the test, any non-tested trackers will be ignored.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DTSBase
member.summary: Voltage Converter Test Class. Run during INIT to read configuration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DTSBase.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the voltage converter ActiveConfiguration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DTSBase.VoltageTargetMapping
member.summary: Gets or sets the voltage targets to sensors mapping.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.DTSBase.FileSystem_
member.summary: Gets or sets the file system interface.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.FlowControlBase
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.FlowControlBase.MyBool
member.summary: Simple enum to hold True/False parameter values.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.FlowControlBase.MyBool.True
member.summary: Enum for True.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.FlowControlBase.MyBool.False
member.summary: Enum For false.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.FlowControlBase.AllowDownbins
member.summary: Gets or sets the flag to indicate if Flow Downbins are allowed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.FlowControlBase.UseMTT
member.summary: Gets or sets the flag to indicate if flow control will use MTT.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.PlistModificationsBase
member.summary: Voltage Converter Test Class. Run during INIT to read configuration.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.PlistModificationsBase.Mode
member.summary: Enumerates different operation modes.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.PlistModificationsBase.Mode.Restore
member.summary: Restore; it reverts back all changes to original state.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.PlistModificationsBase.Mode.Clean
member.summary: Removes node from tree; it will lose track of restore data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.PlistModificationsBase.Patlists
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of patlists to restore.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.PlistModificationsBase.OperationMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the operation mode.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.PreloadParametersBase
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.PreloadParametersBase.InputFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the input file with preloaded configurations to load.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.ExecuteMode
member.summary: Enum to control template execution mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.ExecuteMode.Configure
member.summary: Configure Mode, run once during Init to build the Forwarding Table.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.ExecuteMode.DumpTables
member.summary: Print out all the VminForwarding Table information.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.MyBool
member.summary: Simple enum to hold True/False parameter values.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.MyBool.True
member.summary: Enum for True.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.MyBool.False
member.summary: Enum For false.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.FlowIndexModes
member.summary: Enum to define flow index modes.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.FlowIndexModes.VminForwardingAndLogging
member.summary: Use FlowIndex for VminForwarding and Logging. This is the default mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.FlowIndexModes.LoggingOnly
member.summary: Use flowIndex for Logging only. VminForwarding will use the FlowIndex = 1.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets the Templates Execution mode (Either Configure or DumpTables).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.VminSinglePointMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the operation mode to force VminTC to only run a single test point.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.SearchGuardbandEnable
member.summary: Gets or sets the operation mode to enable VminTC SearchGuardband mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.UseDffAsSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the operation mode flag OperationModeFlag.UseLimitCheckAsSource.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.UseLimitCheck
member.summary: Gets or sets the operation mode flag OperationModeFlag.UseLimitCheck.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.UseVoltagesSources
member.summary: Gets or sets the operation mode flag OperationModeFlag.UseVoltagesSources.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.StoreVoltages
member.summary: Gets or sets the operation mode flag OperationModeFlag.StoreVoltages.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.DffMappingFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the DFF-to-GSDS mapping file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.DffMappingSet
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the Set within the DffMappingFile to use.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.DffMappingOptype
member.summary: Gets or sets the location to read the DFF data from.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.StoreVoltagesDoubleTap
member.summary: Gets or sets an offset to add to stored vmin when delta is greater than the entered offset.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.EnableHermesMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the VminTC flag to enable or disable hermes.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.EnableVminNormalizer
member.summary: Gets or sets the VminTC flag to enable or disable vmin normalizer.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.DisablePerCoreOvershoot
member.summary: Gets or sets the VminTC flag to disable per-core overshoot. If there is overshoot all cores will start at retry voltage.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.FlowIndexMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the FlowIndex mode. Default is VminForwarding_and_Logging while Logging_Only will only use FlowIndex for logging purposes and will use 1 for VminForwarding.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.DDGBaseInitializers.VminForwardingBase.EnableVminStoreResult
member.summary: Gets or sets the VminTC flag to enable or disable vmin store results.
